creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As missmanp@milo.cfw.com wrote:

> After boot-up, netstat -r shows nothing, not even localhost entries.
> Netstat -i shows only the ethernet interface (ed0).  No entries 

There is something very weird with your setup.

> shown for loopback, tun0, etc.  (I have only one ethernet 
> interface and one modem interface on this machine.)

tun0 is meaningless without an attached process.  Don't try to
configure anything for this interface at the shell level, but rather
put this configuration into the ppp scripts where they belong.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
